summary.intent: Remove the unnecessary setup-bun step from the validate-plugin GitHub Actions workflow, since claude plugin validate does not require bun.
summary.outcome: The setup-bun step was removed from .github/workflows/validate-plugin.yaml and the change was committed and pushed.

repo: The validate-plugin.yaml workflow had a superfluous setup-bun step that was not needed for claude plugin validate execution.
CI_COMMITS was previously updated to 8, suggesting active CI iteration in this session.

code.finding: setup-bun step is not required for claude plugin validate and was removed to simplify the workflow.

workflow: When auditing CI workflows, verify each setup step is actually consumed by a subsequent step before keeping it.

open_items: CI results were being monitored at the time of the transcript — outcome of the updated workflow run is unknown.
